zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Bell I於1400年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾瑟斯克時，他的父親Sir William Beale Bell25歲，母親Catherine Gurnerrfelder15歲。他於1420年與Lady Agnes Hayton在英國英格蘭越可爾瑟斯克結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1461年在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Bell I于1400年出生在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾瑟斯克时，他的父亲Sir William Beale Bell25岁，母亲Catherine Gurnerrfelder15岁。他于1420年与Lady Agnes Hayton在英国英格兰越可爾瑟斯克结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1461年在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern) and Scottish (Lowlands): from the Middle English personal name Bell. As a man's name this is from Old French beu, bel ‘handsome’, which was also used as a nickname. As a female name it represents a short form of Isabel .

English (northern) and Scottish (Lowlands): from Middle English belle ‘bell’ (Old English belle), in various applications; most probably a metonymic occupational name for a bell ringer or bell maker, or a topographic name for someone living ‘at the bell’ (as attested by 14th-century forms such as John atte Belle). This indicates either residence by an actual bell (e.g. a town's bell in a bell tower, centrally placed to summon meetings, sound the alarm, etc.) or ‘at the sign of the bell’, i.e. a house or inn sign (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in Scots and English).
English: from Middle English bel ‘fair, fine, good’ (Old French bel ‘beautiful, fair’). See also Beal 1.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfonso, Alvarado, Augusto, Belia, Josefina, Juan, Manuel, Mario, Romero, Santa.

French, Spanish, Portuguese, and English (of French origin): from the Old French female personal name Isabel, which is first recorded in late 11th-century Paris and Maine (France). It was an alternative form of Elizabeth , Old French Elisabet, which had a shortened pet form Isabet. Isabel appears to have originated as a variant of Isabet, in which the suffix -el was substituted for -et through re-interpretation of -et as a hypocoristic diminutive. The resultant -bel was early associated with Old French bel ‘fair, beautiful’, as is evident in the French variant Isabeau. From France the name was taken to England, where it achieved considerable popularity in the late medieval period as an independent personal name alongside its rarer doublet Elizabeth. In the form Isabel it also appears in Spain and Portugal, while in Italy it took the form Isabella . The French surnames Isabel and Isabelle are particularly associated with Normandy.
History: Michel Isabel from Reux in Calvados, France, married Marie Jobidon in Château-Richer, QC, in 1673.

variants.name: Beller
meanings: English: occupational name for a bell founder or bell ringer, from Middle English beller, an agent derivative of Old English belle ‘bell’. Compare Bell 2.
German: habitational name for someone from any of several places called Bell in North Rhine-Westphalia or Bellen near Bremen.
German: nickname for a quarreller, from Middle High German bellen ‘to bicker, quarrel’.

variants.name: Bells
meanings: English: variant of Bell with genitival or excrescent -s.

variants.name: Bellman
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a bell ringer, in particular one whose duty was to make public announcements, after ringing a bell to attract attention (from Middle English bel(le)man, a term known to have been used in York and Scotland, and probably elsewhere, for a town crier). Compare Bell .
English: occupational name from Middle English beli-man ‘bellows blower’, from Middle English beli ‘bellows’. Compare Bellow .
Altered form of German   Bellmann  . This surname is also found in Sweden.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Bell I was born in 1400, in Thirsk, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Beale Bell, was 25 and his mother, Catherine Gurnerrfelder, was 15. He married Lady Agnes Hayton in 1420, in Thirsk, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1461, in West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Bell I est né en 1400, à Thirsk, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Beale Bell, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Catherine Gurnerrfelder, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes Hayton en 1420, à Thirsk, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1461, à West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

Er hat 1420 in Thirsk, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Agnes Hayton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1461 im Alter von 61 Jahren in West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Lady Agnes Hayton nel 1420, nel Thirsk, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1461, nel West Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Bell Iが1400年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアスイルスクで生まれた時，父Sir William Beale Bellは25歳，母Catherine Gurnerrfelderは15歳であった。1420年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスイルスクでLady Agnes Haytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1461年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Bell I(이)가 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 스이르스크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Beale Bell(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Gurnerrfelder(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스이르스크에서 Lady Agnes Hayton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1461년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Bell I родился в 1400 г. в местности тирск, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Beale Bell было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Gurnerrfelder, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes Hayton в 1420 г. в местности тирск, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1461 г. в местности вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.
